transcript.text:
This is Seoul's top 3 kimchi stew restaurant
[This is...]
[Bangsan Market: Onjujeong]
[Lovely]
[As a lettuce wrap?]
[It's tasty!]
Must cut it all up
[A little harsh...]
[Are you eating all of that...?!]
[A mukbang that will keep you entertained starting now]
[This is Bangsan Market, located in Seoul Jung-gu]
Hello everyone
I'm here at Bangsan Market in Bangsan
There's a very famous kimchi stew restaurant here Often referred to as "1 of Seoul's top 3"
I even know about this place and I've been wanting to come for a long time
Their kimchi stew can be eaten in a lettuce wrap

In a lettuce wrap...?
Let's head over
Let's go!
[Onjujeong] [Seoul, Jung-gu]
Hello
I came in just in time for an early dinner
And there are a lot of customers coming in
What's on the menu?
We just have kimchi stew for lunch
Order pork belly for dinner and the stew is on the house
Ordering just the stew is possible?
I saw this on a blog Do you guys have spam?
We can do that
Up to how many servings can you fit in 1 pot?
We can fit up to 4 servings
-Then can I do 4 servings of kimchi stew and... -Spam?

[I got you]
I ordered just 4 servings because that's their maximum
But I've been told that this place gives you big portions
They don't usually give you spam for dine-ins
But thankfully she will do it for me this time
So I'm happy
4 servings?
Is that going to be enough for me?
Thank you
This is a big pot It's a lot for 4 servings
They give you this on order I guess it gets cooked here
[Power ON]
It takes about 15 minutes for it to cook
-15 minutes?! -Yes, since it's 4 servings
It may not seem like a lot from the video,
But it's not just the lid

The whole pot is this big
Fried eggs! Thank you!
Fried eggs and spam
They give you lettuce for the wrap It's for the stew
I can't wait I'll eat 1 first
Over here...
1 fried egg on top
It's been a while since I had this
I'm losing patience because of curiosity
Look at the amount
This looks like 8 servings to me
Wow
The color is getting darker
-Can I stir this up for you? -Yes yes
[Kimchi stew getting cooked]
[The owner's grandkids came in]

Look how pretty she is
[Just say so]
[Okay, sure]
How old are you?
[9...]
Do you know me?
You do?
Little bit?
[Owner's daughter from the cafe next door] Here are some drinks, I'm a fan!
Enjoy your meal!
[Is she really this famous...?]
[It's finally ready to eat!]
Thank you
It's a lot of food 4 people struggle to eat 4 servings
But how is she not gaining any weight?
Her face is so small

It comes with rice like this
The stew is looking scrumptious
[It's been a long wait~!]
Looks delicious Bon appetit
It has fat meat, my favorite
I like fat more than the meat itself
Lovely!
Wow!
The soup's initial flavor is spicy
Very flavorful towards the end with some sweetness
It's not too sour Just the right amount of sourness,
Right amount of sweetness
The balance is great
It's tasty~
Get some kimchi
Over rice

Scoop some soup
With a ladle
I like eating small pieces of kimchi
Cut it up like this
This is the real deal Looks great
[Thumbs up]
This is great
I'm loving the balance
It's a kimchi stew that everybody would enjoy
[I really want some too...]
[Can't take this anymore!]
Let's get some on here
Eating the stew as I eat kimchi over rice
[Is there a difference...?]
I really want to eat this with dried seaweed!
They give you plenty of meat Most places don't give you this much meat

Looks how much meat is in here
This is all meat on the bottom
This is a meat stew, not a kimchi stew
It's delicious...
Break up the tofu
[Shower it with soup]
Lovely
[Hold on]
This is too hot
I'm making a weird face
Oh right,
I almost forgot about the lettuce wrap
How is this done?
Get some rice
With kimchi
And meat

And some soy bean paste on it
[Wow]
It gives it a new flavor Not bad!
Different than dried seaweed
What's this?
Chard...
It helps with anti-aging
Make a wrap
It's really not bad
Cut it up
[Cut it all up...]
Get it with rice like this!
This is lava!
[They gave her some dried seaweed]
This is the best! Delicious
You can do this too

It's really convenient
Can't forget about dried seaweed when eating kimchi stew
This is such a fantastic combination
It may seem weird, but it's better than expected
It's dripping
How do I eat this?
[Wait a minute...]
I forgot about my spam!
It's going to taste great with this Cut it in half like so
Spam wrap!
Some kimchi...
This is all meat Where's the kimchi?
This is a meat stew
It's all meat
Step 1 is to cut it into small pieces
It looks delicious!

Spam on top!
Does anyone eat it like this?
It's usually with white rice with stew on the side
Pour some stew over it
Cut it all up again
[This kimchi stew is getting minced this mukbang]
Fried egg
Inside
Break it up
It's going to taste great together
[Turned into fried egg bibimbap]
This looks yummy too with eggs
Looks good
It's really not bad!
[Such a good eater...]
[Touched...]

What? It's almost gone? Huh?
[Cut it all up again]
As a wrap
1 more time
Break it a little
On top Wait, it's not going to work!
Don't spill!
This is how it's done
Meat and kimchi on top
I love how this is not too salty
It's almost all gone
I ate it all
[Cut it up 1 last time...]
[A little harsh...]
Scissorhands!
Cut up the spam and eggs

I'll eat the last one luxuriously
[A special bibimbap rice with spam]
This is... that
[Q1. What is "that"?]
You're eating so well
-How is it? -It's so delicious
-I'm almost finished with it -Seems like you are
This is a real mukbang
-Enjoy your meal -Thank you
[A finale with the special bibimbap]
With dried seaweed
[Unce unce unce]
Empty
Ending it luxuriously like this
1 big spoonful
[Load 1 seaweed]

This method is funny, right? But it's very convenient
[She continues to eat without saying a word]
[Has some on her eye]
[Conquered]
[Can't leave the fried eggs behind]
Thanks everyone~ [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
